name: influencex
description: InfluenceX - Telegram Mini App creator-business marketplace (Faza 1 MVP)

scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.build:mini-app: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/mini-app
scripts.build:admin: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/admin
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/mini-app && npm run build --workspace=apps/admin
